business_angle: Alexander’s Painters&Decorators: heating and plumbing with quality workmanship
distinctive_phrases: Having our upstairs box room refurbished
He decorated the room fully, including the walls, ceiling, woodwork and the radiator

strongest_review_quote.text: Having our upstairs box room refurbished. Neil came over and firstly removed all the historic wall paper (layers of it) and then saved us money on a plasterer by carefully filling and sanding everywhere that needed it. He decorated the room fully, including the walls, ceiling, woodwork and the radiator. Neil did a really good job! He’s also a really good guy; professional and also personable. I would definitely recommend him for any decorating jobs you have.
strongest_review_quote.author: Sachin

best_photos_rationale: Google Places photos preferred for gallery when high quality
claims_to_avoid: Supplier names as job locations in captions
